executives.name: Ian Cockerill
executives.background: Ian Cockerill has over 45 years of experience in the global natural resources industry. He previously served as CEO of Gold Fields and Anglo Coal, and was a non-executive director of Endeavour since 2019 before being appointed CEO.

executives.name: Guy Young
executives.background: Guy Young joined Endeavour in 2023. He was previously CFO of Anglo American Platinum and has held various senior financial roles within the Anglo American Group.

executives.name: Mark Morcombe
executives.background: Mark Morcombe has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously held senior roles at AngloGold Ashanti and Acacia Mining.

executives.name: Pascal Bernasconi
executives.background: Pascal Bernasconi has been with Endeavour since 2012 and has extensive experience in West African mining operations and public affairs.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Public Affairs, CSR and Security

executives.name: Morgan Carroll
executives.background: Morgan Carroll is a qualified lawyer with extensive experience in corporate law and the mining sector.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Corporate Finance and General Counsel
Executive Vice President, Corporate Finance and General Counsel

executives.name: Alison Baker
executives.background: Ms. Baker has over 25 years of experience in the provision of audit, capital markets and advisory services. She was previously a partner at PwC and EY.

executives.name: Cathia Lawson-Hall
executives.background: Cathia Lawson-Hall has over 25 years of experience in the financial sector, specifically in investment banking and corporate finance in Africa.

executives.name: Janice Stairs
executives.background: Ms. Stairs is a lawyer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the Chair of the Board of Trilogy Metals Inc.

executives.name: Sofia Bianchi
executives.background: Sofia has over 30 years of experience in finance and investment. She was previously Head of Special Situations at BlueCrest Capital Management and has held senior roles at the EBRD and Emerging Markets Partnership.

executives.name: Srinivasan Venkatakrishnan
executives.background: Venkat has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. He was previously CEO of AngloGold Ashanti and Vedanta Resources.

executives.name: Sébastien de Montessus
executives.background: Former President and CEO. He was terminated for cause in January 2024 following an investigation into an irregular payment instruction.

executives.name: Attie Roux
executives.background: Mr. Roux is the Chief Projects Officer. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operational management.

executives.name: Livia Mahler
executives.background: Livia Mahler has over 30 years of experience in the venture capital and investment sectors.

executives.name: Naguib Sawiris
executives.background: Naguib Sawiris is the Chairman of Orascom TMT Investments S.à r.l. and has extensive experience in the telecommunications and mining sectors.

executives.name: Neil Woodyer
executives.background: CEO of Aris Mining. Founder and former CEO of Endeavour Mining and Leagold Mining.

executives.name: Sakhila Mirza
executives.background: Sakhila Mirza is the General Counsel and an Executive Director of the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA).

board_of_directors.name: Srinivasan Venkatakrishnan
board_of_directors.background: Venkat has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. He was previously CEO of AngloGold Ashanti and Vedanta Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Cockerill
board_of_directors.background: Ian Cockerill has over 45 years of experience in the global natural resources industry.

board_of_directors.name: Alison Baker
board_of_directors.background: Alison Baker has over 25 years of experience in the provision of audit and advisory services to the energy and mining sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Livia Mahler
board_of_directors.background: Livia Mahler has over 30 years of experience in the venture capital and investment sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Tertius Zongo
board_of_directors.background: Tertius Zongo served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso from 2007 to 2011 and has held various senior government and international roles.

board_of_directors.name: Cathia Lawson-Hall
board_of_directors.background: Cathia Lawson-Hall has over 25 years of experience in the financial sector, specifically in investment banking and corporate finance in Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Sakhila Mirza
board_of_directors.background: Sakhila Mirza is the General Counsel and an Executive Director of the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA).

board_of_directors.name: Sofia Bianchi
board_of_directors.background: Sofia has over 30 years of experience in finance and investment. She was previously Head of Special Situations at BlueCrest Capital Management and has held senior roles at the EBRD and Emerging Markets Partnership.

board_of_directors.name: Naguib Sawiris
board_of_directors.background: Naguib Sawiris is the Chairman of Orascom TMT Investments S.à r.l. and has extensive experience in the telecommunications and mining sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Patrick de Saint-Aignan
board_of_directors.background: Patrick de Saint-Aignan has over 40 years of experience in the financial services industry, primarily at Morgan Stanley.
